about.title: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS — a reliable passenger transport operator in London
about.subtitle: Transfers, corporate transport and group transportation
about.p1: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS is a transport company that organises passenger transportation in London and beyond.
about.p2: We work with private clients, companies and groups.
about.p3: We structure every journey as a managed process — from receiving the request to completing the route.
about.p4: This approach allows us to maintain a consistent level of service, regardless of the transport format and number of passengers.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS provides a full range of transportation services for both private clients and corporate partners.
services.servicePrivate: Airport Transfers – Private cars and minibuses for individuals and families.
services.serviceCorporate: Corporate Transport – Business-class vehicles for executives and teams.
services.serviceGroup: Group Transportation – Buses and minibuses for events, conferences, and tours.
services.serviceFixed: Fixed Route Services – Scheduled transfers between key locations.
services.keyAdvantagesTitle: Key advantages of working with us

airport.title: Airport Transfer
airport.desc: Transfers to Heathrow, Gatwick, Stansted, Luton and London City. Airport meet & greet, luggage assistance, arrival time monitoring.

corporate.title: Corporate Transport
corporate.desc: Trips for employees and clients. Transport for business events and regular routes.

group.title: Group Transfer
group.desc: Minibuses and coaches for groups. Schools, tourists, corporate trips.

private.title: Private Hire
private.desc: Weddings, events, city journeys and beyond. Our own fleet reduces reliance on third-party resources and increases order fulfilment stability.

servicesKeyAdvantages: Single operator for different transport formats
Transport adapted to the client's needs

clients.title: Why clients choose LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS for private and corporate transport
clients.subtitle: We work with private and corporate clients, providing managed and predictable transport solutions
clients.text: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS is focused on working with various categories of clients — from private customers to companies and organised groups. Our operating model allows us to adapt the transport format to the client's needs, ensuring a consistent level of service and control regardless of order scale.
clients.text2: We do not offer one-size-fits-all solutions — each journey is built taking into account the client's requirements, the trip format and organisational conditions.
clients.whoPrivateDesc: individual trips, airport transfers, family routes and private events.
clients.whoCorporateDesc: companies requiring systematic transport for employees, guests, business meetings and events.
clients.whoEducationDesc: schools, colleges and universities organising trips for students and groups.
clients.whoTourGroupsDesc: tour operators, groups of travellers and trip organisers.
clients.whoEventDesc: weddings, private events, corporate outings and other events.
whyList: Registered company in the UK with extensive experience
Own fleet with scalability to match client needs
Work with private, corporate and institutional clients
Centralised management and control of all transport stages
Single point of accountability for the client
Flexible operating model adaptable to different order formats

privacyNote.title: Processing of Personal Data
privacyNote.p1: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS processes personal data provided in the form solely for the purpose of handling requests, arranging transportation, and communicating with the client.
privacyNote.p2: Data is not used for marketing communications without separate consent and is not shared with third parties except as necessary to fulfil the service (e.g., drivers or partner carriers).
privacyNote.p3: You have the right to request access to, correction, or deletion of your data.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS processes personal data of website users in accordance with UK GDPR.
privacy.section1Text:
This Privacy Policy describes how LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS processes personal data of website users.
Company: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS LTD
Jurisdiction: England and Wales
Company Number: 00000000
Registered Address: 10 Example House, London, United Kingdom
LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS is a data controller in accordance with UK GDPR requirements.
privacy.section5Text:
We may share data with:
- drivers and transport partners;
- contractors involved in performing the service.
Sharing is limited to the extent necessary to provide the service.
privacy.section6Text: Personal data is retained no longer than necessary for the purposes of processing or as required by law.
privacy.section8Text: The company takes reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect personal data.
privacy.section9Text: Regarding data processing matters, the user may contact LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS using the contact details provided on the website.
privacy.section10Text: The company reserves the right to make changes to this Policy.

cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.description: How LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS uses cookies and similar technologies on the website.
cookie.section1Text:
This Cookie Policy explains how LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS uses cookies and similar technologies on the website.
The use of cookies is governed by:
- UK GDPR;
- Privacy and Electronic Communications Regulations (PECR).
cookie.section2Text:
Cookies are small text files that are stored on a user's device when visiting a website. They allow the website to recognise the user's device and remember certain information.
Cookies can be:
- session cookies, deleted after closing the browser;
- persistent cookies, stored on the device for a set period.
cookie.section3Text:
Strictly necessary cookies are required for the proper functioning of the website and do not require user consent. They are used to ensure basic website functionality, save user choices and maintain security.
Analytics cookies are used to analyse user behaviour and improve website performance. These cookies are only used with user consent.
Functional cookies allow the website to remember user preferences, such as language or interface settings. They are only used with consent unless strictly necessary.
cookie.section4Text: Strictly necessary cookies are used on the basis of legitimate interest. All other cookies are used exclusively on the basis of user consent.
cookie.section7Text:
We may use third-party services, such as analytics tools, that set cookies on their own behalf.
Such third parties process data in accordance with their own privacy policies.
cookie.section9Text: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS reserves the right to update this Policy at any time. The current version is always available on the website.
cookie.section10Text: For questions related to the use of cookies, you may contact LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS using the contact details provided on the website.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.description: Terms governing access to and use of the LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS website.
terms.section1Text:
These Terms of Use govern access to and use of this website owned by LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS.
By using the website, the user confirms that they have read these Terms and accept them in full.
If the user does not agree with the Terms, they must stop using the website.
terms.section2Text:
LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS LTD, Private Limited Company, registered in England and Wales.
Company Number: 00000000
Registered Office: 10 Example House, London, United Kingdom
VAT Number: GB 000000000
terms.section4Text:
All information on the website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute a public offer or a legally binding proposal.
A contract for services is concluded separately after agreeing terms with the client.
terms.section6Text:
LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS does not guarantee that the website will operate continuously and without errors, or that the information on the website is always complete and up to date.
The company is not liable for any losses arising from the use of the website, technical failures or temporary unavailability of the website.
To the maximum extent permitted by the laws of England and Wales, the liability of LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS is excluded.
terms.section7Text:
LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS makes reasonable efforts to ensure the accuracy of information but does not guarantee its completeness or currency.
The company reserves the right to change the website content without prior notice.
terms.section8Text:
All materials on the website, including texts, design, graphics and logos, are the property of LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS or used on lawful grounds.
Any use of materials without written permission is prohibited.
terms.section9Text: The website may contain links to third-party websites. LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS does not control and is not responsible for the content of such websites.
terms.section11Text:
LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS may change these Terms at any time. The current version is published on the website.
Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.section12Text:
These Terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales.
All disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.

transportTerms.title: Transport Service Terms
transportTerms.description: Terms governing the provision of transport services by LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS.
transportTerms.section1Text:
These Terms govern the provision of transport services by LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS.
By ordering services, the client confirms agreement with these Terms.
transportTerms.section2Text:
LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS LTD, Private Limited Company, registered in England and Wales.
Company Number: 00000000
Registered Office: 10 Example House, London, United Kingdom
VAT Number: GB 000000000
transportTerms.section7Text:
If the client fails to appear at the agreed time and place:
- the order is considered fulfilled;
- payment is non-refundable.
For airports, the driver will wait for the passenger for a reasonable time after flight landing.
transportTerms.section8Text:
- Waiting time may be included in the price or charged separately;
- Additional waiting time is charged separately.
transportTerms.section9Text:
For airport transfers, the company monitors flight status. In the event of a delay, vehicle dispatch is adjusted where possible.
The company is not liable for delays caused by third parties.
transportTerms.section11Text:
- The client must inform the company in advance about the quantity and type of luggage;
- The company is not liable for loss of or damage to luggage.
transportTerms.section13Text: The company may engage third parties to perform services. LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS remains the responsible operator towards the client.
transportTerms.section15Text: The company is not liable for non-performance of obligations due to circumstances beyond its control.
transportTerms.section16Text: The processing of personal data is carried out in accordance with the Privacy Policy.
transportTerms.section17Text: These Terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales.
transportTerms.section18Text: The company reserves the right to change these Terms. The current version is published on the website.
